flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University at Albany rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.9k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University at Albany rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $31.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University at Albany fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
